reference: Hello, I am sixty-one. Yesterday, I had three glasses of white wine with ice over a four-hour period during dinner. I went to sleep around nine:thirty PM and woke up at two AM screaming and throwing things. I also experienced double vision, meaning my eyes won’t converge. What happened? They are still that way at five PM. I do not feel headache nor do I have one, just a little scared and a bit dizzy. I do live alone.
text: Hello, I am 61. Yesterday, I had three glasses of white wine and ice over a four-hour period for this day. I went to sleep around 9.30 p.m. and woke up at 2 a.m. screaming and groaning at me. I also experienced double visioning, meaning my eyes weren't glowing. What happened? They are still that way at 5 p.m. I do not feel headache, nor do I have to. Just a little scared and a good vision. I do live alone.
